nodes.label: AI as coding assistant for unfamiliar languages
nodes.label_negative: AI as unnecessary for familiar languages
nodes.grounding_span: most helpful when coding in languages I am less familiar with or when using SQL

nodes.label: AI as collaborative partner
nodes.label_negative: AI as autonomous agent for core coding
nodes.grounding_span: I typically involve the model in the early stages if there is code I am trying to better understand

nodes.label: AI context overhead vs. iterative workflow
nodes.label_negative: AI seamless integration with minimal context
nodes.grounding_span: Each time I talk with the model I must begin a new conversation. This involves repeatedly giving the model background

nodes.label: AI tendency toward robust solutions vs. iterative approach
nodes.grounding_span: the model opt to make large changes or robust solutions when most of the time I want to take a more iterative approach

nodes.label: AI effectiveness for unit test generation
nodes.grounding_span: Unit tests have no prod implications, I do not need to look them over as carefully

nodes.label: Organizational mandate vs. genuine utility
nodes.label_negative: Voluntary AI use based on need
nodes.grounding_span: my org and manger expectation is to use them regularly. I would still use them without this, but not as often

nodes.label: AI as assistant for complex work
nodes.label_negative: AI as generic task delegation tool
nodes.grounding_span: models will be developed with more of a personal assistant mentality. That they will learn and retain my workflow

nodes.label: AI as tone checker for professional communication
nodes.label_negative: AI condescending or overly apologetic tone
nodes.grounding_span: the way they speak comes off as condescending or 'yes man' like

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: I was using the model to try to iterate quickly on test scripts

nodes.label: Code quality and correctness
nodes.grounding_span: I prefer to handle most coding tasks myself

nodes.label: Efficiency and speed in communication
nodes.grounding_span: the model should pay attention to the way I am talking about the mistake and customize how apologetic they are

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for simple syntax issues
nodes.grounding_span: most helpful when coding in languages I am less familiar with

nodes.label: Frustration with AI's inability to maintain context
nodes.grounding_span: I was quite frustrated because the model kept trying to make robust and comprehensive test scripts

nodes.label: Resistance to mandated AI use for meaningless tests
nodes.grounding_span: the tool use requirement has led to the bloat of meaningless unit tests

nodes.label: Optimism about AI as future personal assistant
nodes.grounding_span: It is my hope that models will be developed with more of a personal assistant mentality

nodes.label: Frustration with AI when it deviates from tone
nodes.grounding_span: the way they speak comes off as condescending or 'yes man' like

nodes.label: Iterative and incremental approach to coding
nodes.grounding_span: most of the time I want to take a more iterative approach

nodes.label: Preference for minimal context overhead and direct communication
nodes.grounding_span: sometimes a 'my bad, fixed!' is all that would be needed
